name: flow-webext
description: Shared Flow WebExtension shell for Chromium, Firefox, and Safari local-first inference

scripts.build:all: node ./scripts/build.mjs chromium && node ./scripts/build.mjs firefox && node ./scripts/build.mjs safari
scripts.package:all: npm run build:all && node ./scripts/package.mjs chromium && node ./scripts/package.mjs firefox && node ./scripts/package.mjs safari
